issues.message: Missing documentation of /prettier and /order sub-configs. The vendor README and package.json exports document two additional configs: @gravity-ui/stylelint-config/prettier (Prettier integration) and @gravity-ui/stylelint-config/order (CSS property ordering). These are not mentioned in the data file.
Requirements section lists 'Stylelint 16.18.0' as an exact version, but the actual peerDependency is '^16.18.0' (>=16.18.0 <17.0.0). Minor inaccuracy.
